violations.description: General employee practices. — --Food employee observed drinking/using open beverage container outside of designated area. Store personal beverages away from work surfaces. Store personal beverages in closed containers that restrict hand to mouth contact surfaces.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Three compartment sink was not designed and/or constructed properly. 3 tub sink not fitted with drain trays. See initial inspection report. Wire rack shelving units next to and above sinks used for storage of items. Ensure shelf is provided and used for air drying utensils.

Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. Obtain chemical test strips for maintaining proper sanitizer chemical concentrations.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Invert forks at customer self service counter to protect items from potential contamination.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Floors not yet sealed per requirements. See initial inspection report.
